name: virtual_to_original
description: Map virtual-timeline timestamps to original-file timestamps (or inverse). Utility for debugging trim specs.

output.description: Object with 'results' array of mapped timestamps

params.name: times
params.description: Timestamps to map, as a JSON array of numbers, e.g. [47.32, 53.23]

params.name: inverse
params.description: If true, map original-file timestamps to virtual timestamps instead
